content:
「让我想想应该怎么表演……」
「救救我，不，味道还不够，要更恐惧，更绝望……」
就像，那些幸存者临死前的哀嚎。

✦ 茉夏 CV：长谷川育美

🎁**评论有奖**
✦ 在评论区留下你的uid，即可参与抽奖，截止时间2026/01/26 23:59。
✦ 我们将从评论中选出10位守密人赠送「银芯×500」、5位赠送「流明之芯×5」、3位赠送「流明之芯×10」。
✦ 中奖名单将在活动结束后72小时内公布，届时请留意官方动态。
——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

"Now, how should I act this out..."
"Help me... no, it's not real enough... needs more fear, more despair..."
Just like the dying wails of those survivors.

✦ Mouchette VA：Hasegawa Ikumi

🎁  **Comment-to-Win**
✦ Leave your UID in the comments to enter the giveaway. Deadline: <t:1769443199:F>.
✦ From the comments, we’ll select:
 • 10 winners to receive 500 Silver Cores;
 • 5 winners to receive 5 Luminous Cores;
 • 3 winners to receive 10 Luminous Cores.
✦ The winners will be announced within 72 hours after the event ends. Please stay tuned to our official updates!
